final_prompt.prompt:
Create an e-commerce landing page hero section mockup for a beauty brand named "LUMEA BEAUTY" (all in-image text in Japanese).

Style/medium: needs a "clean, bright, airy, feminine" aesthetic with floral accents — references in the spirit of Glossier brand photography, Kinfolk magazine editorial layout, 2010s Scandinavian beauty product design; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a hero section layout with left column (text content), center subject (model), right column (product display + stat cards), bottom benefit cards row
Subject: must include a young East Asian woman smiling and touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of moisturizing boost serum, plus 2 product items (serum dropper bottle and packaging box)
Scene/backdrop: needs a clean, airy backdrop with purple flowers as floral accents — exact arrangement is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a soft, bright lighting atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must be soft pink and white dominant with purple floral accents — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: needs a clean, premium surface treatment — exact finish is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "LUMEA BEAUTY" (logo), "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。" (headline), "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。" (subheadline), navigation links: "特徴" / "成分" / "お客様の声" / "使い方" / "FAQ", CTA buttons: "今すぐ試す", "初回限定で試してみる >", "成分をチェック >", feature badges: "敏感肌OK" / "高保湿" / "朝晩使える", bullet points: "美容成分をしっかり届ける" / "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ" / "続けやすいシンプルケア", trust badges: "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし", stat cards: "満足度 96%" / "美容成分 5種配合" / "愛用者 12,000人突破", benefit cards: "うるおい" / "透明感" / "使いやすさ"
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Japanese by default; must preserve navigation structure with 5 links, 3 feature badges (pill-shaped with icons), 3 bullet points (pink checkmarks), 2 CTA buttons, 3 stat cards (floating white rounded rectangles with gold accents), 3 benefit cards (horizontal white rounded rectangles with icons)
Avoid:

raw:
